title: JayWisdom.eth — Google Project by jaywisdom.base.eth — Live in Stereo

repository_evidence.observed_statement: JOY identifies jaywisdom.base.eth and jaywisdom.eth as the project identity and public metadata root.
COMPUTERWISDOM identifies Jason Wisdom / Jay Wisdom and jaywisdom.base.eth while preserving authority=false.
ENS is a placeholder namespace and explicitly does not prove active ENS or Basename records.

channel_right.label: GOOGLE_PROJECT_AND_ACCESS_FRICTION
session_observations: Cloud Shell mobile session repeatedly disconnected.
gcloud storage buckets list exited 1 because no active account was selected.
gcloud auth list returned no account rows.
Cloud Shell browser authorization handoff was not established in the observed session.

machine_channel.purpose: Emit hashes, repository anchors, statuses, and explicit non-conclusions.

human_channel.purpose: Explain what the evidence means and prevent narrative promotion.

stereo_mix.permitted_convergence: A public GitHub evidence surface links Jay Wisdom identity claims to a documented Google Cloud access-friction record.
forbidden_convergence: GitHub evidence does not prove Google IAM ownership.
A public name does not prove wallet or name control.
A Cloud Shell failure does not prove misconduct or intent.
An EAS reference does not prove binding unless independently replayed.
A hash proves byte identity only for the bytes actually hashed.

satire_track.caption: JayWisdom live in stereo: left speaker says receipts, right speaker says reconnect, and the bass refuses fake green.
